1.description: (Color online) Distribution of Syrians Under Temporary Protection by Year Source. Presidency of Migration Management, Ministry of Interior, Republic of Turkey.

2.description: (Color online) Average Repair Price in TRY and 95% Confidence Intervals, Conditional on Treatment Note. MAJ-ORD, majority customers in an ordinary goods market; MAJ-CRE, majority customers in a credence goods market; MIN-ORD, minority customers in an ordinary goods market; MIN-CRE, minority customers in a credence goods market.

3.description: (Color online) Cumulative Distribution Function of Repair Prices (in TRY), Conditional on Treatment Note. MAJ-ORD, majority customers in an ordinary goods market; MAJ-CRE, majority customers in a credence goods market; MIN-ORD, minority customers in an ordinary goods market; MIN-CRE, minority customers in a credence goods market.
